title: Goldman Sachs Integrates Mythos - TCR 04/14/26
description:
Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon told analysts on a public earnings call that the bank has Claude Mythos deployed and is working directly with Anthropic to harden its cybersecurity infrastructure, as a daily pill nearly doubled pancreatic cancer survival and 67% of planned U.S. data centers shift to rural America.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-14-2026/

Goldman Sachs converted the Mythos cybersecurity arc from closed-door institutional coordination into public financial disclosure, with CEO David Solomon naming the model and describing an active defensive partnership with Anthropic on a first-quarter earnings call where the bank posted record equities trading revenue of $5.33 billion. The UK AI Security Institute simultaneously confirmed that Mythos completed a 32-step autonomous cyberattack simulation in three of ten attempts, the first model to do so. OpenAI's chief revenue officer distributed an internal memo - leaked within hours - accusing Anthropic of inflating its revenue by $8 billion and framing its safety philosophy as elitist restriction, even as institutions coordinate around Anthropic's systems for defense. Revolution Medicines reported that daraxonrasib, a daily oral pill targeting RAS mutations, nearly doubled survival in second-line pancreatic cancer - 13.2 months versus 6.7 months for chemotherapy - cracking a pathway oncologists pursued for decades without success. Pew Research Center found that 67% of the 1,500+ planned U.S. data centers are sited in rural areas, while PJM Interconnection proposed a backstop procurement of 14.9 GW of new generation to address projected capacity shortfalls driven by data center growth. Chalmers University published theory for giant superatoms merging two quantum concepts into a single system capable of protecting, controlling, and distributing quantum information at scale.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-14-2026/
